claim: Paige Ostroushko was arrested for assaulting reporter Savanah Hernandez during an anti-ICE protest, with videos showing the incident and charges to be filed.

sub_questions.question: WHO is Savanah Hernandez and what is her role/affiliation?
WHAT exactly happened to Savanah Hernandez during the alleged incident?
WHO is Paige Ostroushko and was she arrested in connection with this incident?
WHEN and WHERE did this incident occur (date, location, context of anti-ICE protest)?
Are there videos showing the incident, and have charges been filed against Paige Ostroushko?
